comment: Dense, continuous story VO (v3) for the 3-minute Launch Film — fills each scene window so Brian rarely stops, with a mysterious finish. Scenes: S1 0-26, S2 26-48, S3 48-82, S4 82-116, S5 116-146, S6 146-168, S7 168-180. mux.mjs time-fits each line into its slot.

lines.text: Every four years, the whole world holds its breath for one tournament.
Forty-eight nations, a billion dreams, and a single month that stops the planet.
We've always watched it together — the joy, the heartbreak, the impossible goals.
But this time, you won't just watch the World Cup. You'll play it.
Welcome to WorldCup twenty-six — and your tournament starts right now.
Getting in couldn't be simpler — just two taps, and you've joined the game.
Arrive with a friend's invite code, and your connection is set from the start.
No long forms, no friction; your referral is solved before your account even exists.
One tap to continue with Google, and just like that, you're in.
And your journey through the tournament begins.
Now comes the decision that is yours, and yours alone.
From all forty-eight nations chasing glory, you choose only three.
Will you trust the giants — the favorites everyone expects to win it all?
Or will you back the outsiders, the dark horses nobody sees coming?
Balance your three: a little safety, a little daring, and a lot of belief.
Search any team, any group, any confederation, and build your perfect lineup.
Then lock your entry in, before the very first whistle blows.
And from that moment on, the tournament becomes personal.
Every match your teams play, every goal they score, earns points for you.
But here is where it gets thrilling — not every goal is worth the same.
Back a fearless underdog, and your points multiply, again and again.
The deeper they run, the further they dare to go, the more each goal is worth.
One shock result, and the entire leaderboard rewrites itself.
Your score comes alive with every shot that finds the net.
And waiting at the very top, a prize pool of forty-eight thousand dollars.
Shared among the top ten, and growing with every new player who joins.
Night after night, you watch your teams climb the live leaderboard.
Surging past your rivals, rising closer and closer to the money.
And because a single underdog can change everything, anyone can still win.
Right up to the final whistle, your story is never over.
But the real magic isn't the points — it's the people you bring with you.
Invite your friends with a single tap, and build your own community.
Every friend who joins through your link becomes part of your chain.
Earn three percent from those you invite, and five percent down the line.
The more you share, the more you grow — together.
Forty-eight teams. One unforgettable month. And one question no one can answer yet...
Who will shock the world?
This time, the answer is yours. WorldCup twenty-six dot world.
